titleStmt.title: SII 22.482: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 482.

summary.p: Registers the gift of land to the temple of Chennakēśava-perumāḷ at Śeṭipale by the mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Rāyanarāju Koṇḍayyadēvamahārāju. The gift was obtained from Aḷiyarāmarāju as uṁbaḷi.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbu
lu 1480 Agunēṭi kāḷayukti saṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 3 gu śrīmanmahā maṁ
ḍalēśvara rāmarāju rāyanarāju koṁḍayya dēvamahārājulu śeṭṭipalle cena
kēśava perumāḷaku daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁci Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ Aḷiyarāmarāju
Ayyavāru mākunu vuṁbaḷiki pāliṁci Iccina śeṭipale kēśavaperumāḷaku yīta
thātithi puṁṇyakālaṁ tirunāḷa mahōtsava kaiṁkaryālakunu pātra bhōga vaibha
vālakunu dhāravōsi Iccinakṣētraṁ pallavāṭi teruvu paḍumaṭa vuppuvāṁgu
ku Uttaracēnu kha 2 ... nu yēkuvarēga kōnēru seṭikuṁṭa Uttarāna cēnu
kha 1 nu varimaḍi ceruvu kiṁdaku kha 0/0 vubhayaṁ cēnu maḍi sahā
nālugu puṭlunu trivācakaṁgānu samarpiṁci Icina dharma
śāsanamu yīdharmānaku yevāru tappinā talli daṁḍrādula vāraṇāsilō vadhi ṁcina pāpāna bōduru tama guruvulaku tirumaṇi tirucūrnānaku veli I vāru maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī jēyunū kriṣṇa
Digital edition of SII 22.482 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
